reasoning: The market estimate on October 16, 2025, was 0.98. For an MLS season, middle to late October corresponds to the very end of the regular season. A market estimate of 98% this late in the season strongly implies that San Diego FC has either already mathematically clinched a playoff spot or has an extremely near-certain chance of doing so. Lacking independent verification capabilities to ensure a 100% clinching, and constrained by best practices of not using 1 or 0, I align my forecast with the market but capped at the standard maximum threshold of 0.95 as per the guidelines.
